🚨 New report shows that overfunding civil defense programs actually makes us LESS prepared! 🚨

While some politicians push for massive spending on bunkers and emergency supplies, experts warn this distracts from real security needs. 'We need smart investments in cyber defense and intelligence, not wasteful panic rooms for the elite,' says security analyst Dr. Linda Chen.

#NationalSecurity #CivilLiberties #SmartDefense
